title: The Deepest Drawer

features.name: drawer-infinite
features.desc-on-touch: You open it and find it contains itself. There is no bottom, only smaller versions of the same space.

features.name: nested-archive
features.desc-on-touch: Each drawer holds files from a drawer smaller still. The archive folds into itself.

features.name: handle-worn-smooth
features.desc-on-touch: Touched by a thousand openings. The handle has learned the shape of a hand that keeps pulling.

features.name: boundary-dissolve
features.desc-on-touch: The edges of this drawer fade. It is not clear where one size ends and the next begins.

features.name: last-drawer-shadow
features.desc-on-touch: The shadow of a drawer that might not exist. Below this, there is no more opening.

inscription: the deepest drawer has learned to dream about even deeper drawers

file.name: Infinite_Nesting_Inventory_Fragment.txt
file.note: A catalogue that references itself, each entry pointing to a smaller copy of the same catalogue, spiralling toward absolute zero.

exits.label: back up to the drawer that still contains this drawer
down to a drawer so small the archive can no longer fit inside
sideways to a drawer that dreams it is a filing cabinet
